positive: A retro 8-bit style illustration of a cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a rainy window. Neon signs glow with Japanese kanji, flying hover cars streak across the background, and a lone figure stands silhouetted against the rain. Pixel art aesthetic, vaporwave colors, synthwave mood, high contrast, minimalist details.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, smooth gradients, naturalism
